translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the first day of the second month of the second year after the Israelites had come out of the land of Egypt, the LORD spoke to Moses in the Tent of Meeting in the Wilderness of Sinai. He said:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Take a census of the whole congregation of Israel by their clans and families, listing every man by name, one by one.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You and Aaron are to number those who are twenty years of age or older by their divisions—everyone who can serve in Israel’s army.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And one man from each tribe, the head of each family, must be there with you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are the names of the men who are to assist you: From the tribe of Reuben, Elizur son of Shedeur;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Simeon, Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Judah, Nahshon son of Amminadab;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Issachar, Nethanel son of Zuar;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Zebulun, Eliab son of Helon;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from the sons of Joseph: from Ephraim, Elishama son of Ammihud, and from Manasseh, Gamaliel son of Pedahzur;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Benjamin, Abidan son of Gideoni;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Dan, Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Asher, Pagiel son of Ocran;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from Gad, Eliasaph son of Deuel;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and from Naphtali, Ahira son of Enan.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These men were appointed from the congregation; they were the leaders of the tribes of their fathers, the heads of the clans of Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses and Aaron took these men who had been designated by name,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and on the first day of the second month they assembled the whole congregation and recorded their ancestry by clans and families, counting one by one the names of those twenty years of age or older,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: just as the LORD had commanded Moses. So Moses numbered them in the Wilderness of Sinai:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel, according to the records of their clans and families, counting one by one the names of every male twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Reuben numbered 46,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Simeon, according to the records of their clans and families, counting one by one the names of every male twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Simeon numbered 59,300.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Gad, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Gad numbered 45,650.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Judah, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Judah numbered 74,600.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Issachar, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Issachar numbered 54,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Zebulun, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Zebulun numbered 57,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Joseph: From the sons of Ephraim, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Ephraim numbered 40,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And from the sons of Manasseh, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Manasseh numbered 32,200.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Benjamin, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Benjamin numbered 35,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Dan, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Dan numbered 62,700.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Asher, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Asher numbered 41,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the sons of Naphtali, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: those registered to the tribe of Naphtali numbered 53,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were the men numbered by Moses and Aaron, with the assistance of the twelve leaders of Israel, each one representing his family.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So all the Israelites twenty years of age or older who could serve in Israel’s army were counted according to their families.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And all those counted totaled 603,550.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The Levites, however, were not numbered along with them by the tribe of their fathers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the LORD had said to Moses:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Do not number the tribe of Levi in the census with the other Israelites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Instead, you are to appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of the Testimony, all its furnishings, and everything in it. They shall carry the tabernacle and all its articles, care for it, and camp around it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whenever the tabernacle is to move, the Levites are to take it down, and whenever it is to be pitched, the Levites are to set it up. Any outsider who goes near it must be put to death.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The Israelites are to camp by their divisions, each man in his own camp and under his own standard.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But the Levites are to camp around the tabernacle of the Testimony and watch over it, so that no wrath will fall on the congregation of Israel. So the Levites are responsible for the tabernacle of the Testimony.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Thus the Israelites did everything just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “The Israelites are to camp around the Tent of Meeting at a distance from it, each man under his standard, with the banners of his family.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the east side, toward the sunrise, the divisions of Judah are to camp under their standard: The leader of the descendants of Judah is Nahshon son of Amminadab,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 74,600.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The tribe of Issachar will camp next to it. The leader of the Issacharites is Nethanel son of Zuar,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 54,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Next will be the tribe of Zebulun. The leader of the Zebulunites is Eliab son of Helon,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 57,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Judah is 186,400; they shall set out first.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the south side, the divisions of Reuben are to camp under their standard: The leader of the Reubenites is Elizur son of Shedeur,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 46,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The tribe of Simeon will camp next to it. The leader of the Simeonites is Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 59,300.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Next will be the tribe of Gad. The leader of the Gadites is Eliasaph son of Deuel,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 45,650.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Reuben is 151,450; they shall set out second.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In the middle of the camps, the Tent of Meeting is to travel with the camp of the Levites. They are to set out in the order they encamped, each in his own place under his standard.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the west side, the divisions of Ephraim are to camp under their standard: The leader of the Ephraimites is Elishama son of Ammihud,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 40,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The tribe of Manasseh will be next to it. The leader of the Manassites is Gamaliel son of Pedahzur,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 32,200.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Next will be the tribe of Benjamin. The leader of the Benjamites is Abidan son of Gideoni,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 35,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Ephraim is 108,100; they shall set out third.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the north side, the divisions of Dan are to camp under their standard: The leader of the Danites is Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 62,700.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The tribe of Asher will camp next to it. The leader of the Asherites is Pagiel son of Ocran,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 41,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Next will be the tribe of Naphtali. The leader of the Naphtalites is Ahira son of Enan,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and his division numbers 53,400.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of men in the camp of Dan is 157,600; they shall set out last, under their standards.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are the Israelites, numbered according to their families. The total of those counted in the camps, by their divisions, was 603,550.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But the Levites were not counted among the other Israelites, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So the Israelites did everything the LORD commanded Moses; they camped under their standards in this way and set out in the same way, each man with his clan and his family.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the account of Aaron and Moses at the time the LORD spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the firstborn, then Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were Aaron’s sons, the anointed priests, who were ordained to serve as priests.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Nadab and Abihu, however, died in the presence of the LORD when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD in the Wilderness of Sinai. And since they had no sons, only Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests during the lifetime of their father Aaron.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Bring the tribe of Levi and present them to Aaron the priest to assist him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They are to perform duties for him and for the whole congregation before the Tent of Meeting, attending to the service of the tabernacle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They shall take care of all the furnishings of the Tent of Meeting and fulfill obligations for the Israelites by attending to the service of the tabernacle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Assign the Levites to Aaron and his sons; they have been given exclusively to him from among the Israelites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So you shall appoint Aaron and his sons to carry out the duties of the priesthood; but any outsider who approaches the tabernacle must be put to death.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel in place of every firstborn Israelite from the womb. The Levites belong to Me,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for all the firstborn are Mine. On the day I struck down every firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated to Myself all the firstborn in Israel, both man and beast. They are Mine; I am the LORD.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD spoke to Moses in the Wilderness of Sinai, saying,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Number the Levites by their families and clans. You are to count every male a month old or more.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses numbered them according to the word of the LORD, as he had been commanded.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were the sons of Levi by name: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were the names of the sons of Gershon by their clans: Libni and Shimei.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The sons of Kohath by their clans were Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Merari by their clans were Mahli and Mushi. These were the clans of the Levites, according to their families.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From Gershon came the Libnite clan and the Shimeite clan; these were the Gershonite clans.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The number of all the males a month old or more was 7,500.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The Gershonite clans were to camp on the west, behind the tabernacle,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and the leader of the families of the Gershonites was Eliasaph son of Lael.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The duties of the Gershonites at the Tent of Meeting were the tabernacle and tent, its covering, the curtain for the entrance to the Tent of Meeting,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the curtains of the courtyard, the curtain for the entrance to the courtyard that surrounds the tabernacle and altar, and the cords—all the service for these items.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From Kohath came the clans of the Amramites, the Izharites, the Hebronites, and the Uzzielites; these were the clans of the Kohathites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The number of all the males a month old or more was 8,600. They were responsible for the duties of the sanctuary.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The clans of the Kohathites were to camp on the south side of the tabernacle,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and the leader of the families of the Kohathites was Elizaphan son of Uzziel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Their duties were the ark, the table, the lampstand, the altars, the articles of the sanctuary used with them, and the curtain—all the service for these items.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The chief of the leaders of the Levites was Eleazar son of Aaron the priest; he oversaw those responsible for the duties of the sanctuary.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From Merari came the clans of the Mahlites and Mushites; these were the Merarite clans.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The number of all the males a month old or more was 6,200.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The leader of the families of the Merarites was Zuriel son of Abihail; they were to camp on the north side of the tabernacle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The duties assigned to the sons of Merari were the tabernacle’s frames, crossbars, posts, bases, and all its equipment—all the service for these items,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: as well as the posts of the surrounding courtyard with their bases, tent pegs, and ropes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Moses, Aaron, and Aaron’s sons were to camp to the east of the tabernacle, toward the sunrise, before the Tent of Meeting. They were to perform the duties of the sanctuary as a service on behalf of the Israelites; but any outsider who approached the sanctuary was to be put to death.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of Levites that Moses and Aaron counted by their clans at the LORD’s command, including all the males a month old or more, was 22,000.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses, “Number every firstborn male of the Israelites a month old or more, and list their names.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are to take the Levites for Me—I am the LORD—in place of all the firstborn of Israel, and the livestock of the Levites in place of all the firstborn of the livestock of the Israelites.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses numbered all the firstborn of the Israelites, as the LORD had commanded him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The total number of the firstborn males a month old or more, listed by name, was 22,273.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Take the Levites in place of all the firstborn of Israel, and the livestock of the Levites in place of their livestock. The Levites belong to Me; I am the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: To redeem the 273 firstborn Israelites who outnumber the Levites,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: you are to collect five shekels for each one, according to the sanctuary shekel of twenty gerahs.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give the money to Aaron and his sons as the redemption price for the excess among the Israelites.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses collected the redemption money from those in excess of the number redeemed by the Levites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He collected the money from the firstborn of the Israelites: 1,365 shekels, according to the sanctuary shekel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and his sons in obedience to the word of the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Take a census of the Kohathites among the Levites by their clans and families,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: men from thirty to fifty years old—everyone who is qualified to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This service of the Kohathites at the Tent of Meeting regards the most holy things.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whenever the camp sets out, Aaron and his sons are to go in, take down the veil of the curtain, and cover the ark of the Testimony with it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They are to place over this a covering of fine leather, spread a solid blue cloth over it, and insert its poles.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Over the table of the Presence they are to spread a blue cloth and place the plates and cups on it, along with the bowls and pitchers for the drink offering. The regular bread offering is to remain on it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And they shall spread a scarlet cloth over them, cover them with fine leather, and insert the poles.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They are to take a blue cloth and cover the lampstand used for light, together with its lamps, wick trimmers, and trays, as well as the jars of oil with which to supply it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then they shall wrap it and all its utensils inside a covering of fine leather and put it on the carrying frame.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Over the gold altar they are to spread a blue cloth, cover it with fine leather, and insert the poles.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They are to take all the utensils for serving in the sanctuary, place them in a blue cloth, cover them with fine leather, and put them on the carrying frame.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then they shall remove the ashes from the bronze altar, spread a purple cloth over it,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and place on it all the vessels used to serve there: the firepans, meat forks, shovels, and sprinkling bowls—all the equipment of the altar. They are to spread over it a covering of fine leather and insert the poles.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When Aaron and his sons have finished covering the holy objects and all their equipment, as soon as the camp is ready to move, the Kohathites shall come and do the carrying. But they must not touch the holy objects, or they will die. These are the transportation duties of the Kohathites regarding the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Eleazar son of Aaron the priest shall oversee the oil for the light, the fragrant incense, the daily grain offering, and the anointing oil. He has oversight of the entire tabernacle and everything in it, including the holy objects and their utensils.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Do not allow the Kohathite tribal clans to be cut off from among the Levites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In order that they may live and not die when they come near the most holy things, do this for them: Aaron and his sons are to go in and assign each man his task and what he is to carry.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But the Kohathites are not to go in and look at the holy objects, even for a moment, or they will die.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Take a census of the Gershonites as well, by their families and clans,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from thirty to fifty years old, counting everyone who comes to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the service of the Gershonite clans regarding work and transport:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They are to carry the curtains of the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting with the covering of fine leather over it, the curtains for the entrance to the Tent of Meeting,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the curtains of the courtyard, and the curtains for the entrance at the gate of the courtyard that surrounds the tabernacle and altar, along with their ropes and all the equipment for their service. The Gershonites will do all that needs to be done with these items.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All the service of the Gershonites—all their transport duties and other work—is to be done at the direction of Aaron and his sons; you are to assign to them all that they are responsible to carry.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the service of the Gershonite clans at the Tent of Meeting, and their duties shall be under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As for the sons of Merari, you are to number them by their clans and families,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from thirty to fifty years old, counting everyone who comes to serve in the work of the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the duty for all their service at the Tent of Meeting: to carry the frames of the tabernacle with its crossbars, posts, and bases,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and the posts of the surrounding courtyard with their bases, tent pegs, and ropes, including all their equipment and everything related to their use. You shall assign by name the items that they are responsible to carry.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the service of the Merarite clans according to all their work at the Tent of Meeting, under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses, Aaron, and the leaders of the congregation numbered the Kohathites by their clans and families,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And those numbered by their clans totaled 2,750.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were counted from the Kohathite clans, everyone who could serve at the Tent of Meeting. Moses and Aaron numbered them according to the command of the LORD through Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the Gershonites were numbered by their clans and families,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And those numbered by their clans and families totaled 2,630.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were counted from the Gershonite clans who served at the Tent of Meeting, whom Moses and Aaron counted at the LORD’s command.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the Merarites were numbered by their clans and families,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The men registered by their clans numbered 3,200.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These were counted from the Merarite clans, whom Moses and Aaron numbered at the LORD’s command through Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses, Aaron, and the leaders of Israel numbered by their clans and families all the Levites
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: from thirty to fifty years old who came to do the work of serving and carrying the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the number of men was 8,580.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: At the LORD’s command they were numbered through Moses and each one was assigned his work and burden, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Command the Israelites to send away from the camp anyone with a skin disease, anyone who has a bodily discharge, and anyone who is defiled by a dead body.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You must send away male and female alike; send them outside the camp so they will not defile their camp, where I dwell among them.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So the Israelites did this, sending such people outside the camp. They did just as the LORD had instructed Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Tell the Israelites that when a man or woman acts unfaithfully against the LORD by committing any sin against another, that person is guilty
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and must confess the sin he has committed. He must make full restitution, add a fifth to its value, and give all this to the one he has wronged.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But if the man has no relative to whom restitution can be made for the wrong, the restitution belongs to the LORD and must be given to the priest along with the ram of atonement, by which the atonement is made for him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Every sacred contribution the Israelites bring to the priest shall belong to him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Each man’s sacred gifts are his own, but whatever he gives to the priest will belong to the priest.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Speak to the Israelites and tell them that if any man’s wife goes astray and is unfaithful to him
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: by sleeping with another man, and it is concealed from her husband and her impurity is undetected (since there is no witness against her and she was not caught in the act),
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and if a feeling of jealousy comes over her husband and he suspects his wife who has defiled herself—or if a feeling of jealousy comes over him and he suspects her even though she has not defiled herself—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: then he is to bring his wife to the priest. He must also bring for her an offering of a tenth of an ephah of barley flour. He is not to pour oil over it or put frankincense on it, because it is a grain offering for jealousy, an offering of memorial as a reminder of iniquity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The priest is to bring the wife forward and have her stand before the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then he is to take some holy water in a clay jar and put some of the dust from the tabernacle floor into the water.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: After the priest has the woman stand before the LORD, he is to let down her hair and place in her hands the grain offering of memorial, which is the grain offering for jealousy. The priest is to hold the bitter water that brings a curse.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And he is to put the woman under oath and say to her, ‘If no other man has slept with you and you have not gone astray and become defiled while under your husband’s authority, may you be immune to this bitter water that brings a curse.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But if you have gone astray while under your husband’s authority and have defiled yourself and lain carnally with a man other than your husband’—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and the priest shall have the woman swear under the oath of the curse—‘then may the LORD make you an attested curse among your people by making your thigh shrivel and your belly swell.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May this water that brings a curse enter your stomach and cause your belly to swell and your thigh to shrivel.’ Then the woman is to say, ‘Amen, Amen.’
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the priest shall write these curses on a scroll and wash them off into the bitter water.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He is to have the woman drink the bitter water that brings a curse, and it will enter her and cause her bitter suffering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The priest shall take from her hand the grain offering for jealousy, wave it before the LORD, and bring it to the altar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the priest is to take a handful of the grain offering as a memorial portion and burn it on the altar; after that he is to have the woman drink the water.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When he has made her drink the water, if she has defiled herself and been unfaithful to her husband, then the water that brings a curse will enter her and cause bitter suffering; her belly will swell, her thigh will shrivel, and she will become accursed among her people.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But if the woman has not defiled herself and is clean, she will be unaffected and able to conceive children.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the law of jealousy when a wife goes astray and defiles herself while under her husband’s authority,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: or when a feeling of jealousy comes over a husband and he suspects his wife. He is to have the woman stand before the LORD, and the priest is to apply to her this entire law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The husband will be free from guilt, but the woman shall bear her iniquity.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Speak to the Israelites and tell them that if a man or woman makes a special vow, the vow of a Nazirite, to separate himself to the LORD,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: he is to abstain from wine and strong drink. He must not drink vinegar made from wine or strong drink, and he must not drink any grape juice or eat fresh grapes or raisins.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All the days of his separation, he is not to eat anything that comes from the grapevine, not even the seeds or skins.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the entire period of his vow of separation, no razor shall pass over his head. He must be holy until the time of his separation to the LORD is complete; he must let the hair of his head grow long.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Throughout the days of his separation to the LORD, he must not go near a dead body.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even if his father or mother or brother or sister should die, he is not to defile himself, because the crown of consecration to his God is upon his head.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Throughout the time of his separation, he is holy to the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If someone suddenly dies in his presence and defiles his consecrated head of hair, he must shave his head on the day of his cleansing—the seventh day.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the eighth day he must bring two turtledoves or two young pigeons to the priest at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the priest is to offer one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to make atonement for him, because he has sinned by being in the presence of the dead body. On that day he must consecrate his head again.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He must rededicate his time of separation to the LORD and bring a year-old male lamb as a guilt offering. But the preceding days shall not be counted, because his separation was defiled.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Now this is the law of the Nazirite when his time of separation is complete: He must be brought to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and he is to present an offering to the LORD of an unblemished year-old male lamb as a burnt offering, an unblemished year-old female lamb as a sin offering, and an unblemished ram as a peace offering—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: together with their grain offerings and drink offerings—and a basket of unleavened cakes made from fine flour mixed with oil and unleavened wafers coated with oil.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The priest is to present all these before the LORD and make the sin offering and the burnt offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He shall also offer the ram as a peace offering to the LORD, along with the basket of unleavened bread. And the priest is to offer the accompanying grain offering and drink offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, the Nazirite is to shave his consecrated head, take the hair, and put it on the fire under the peace offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the priest is to take the boiled shoulder from the ram, one unleavened cake from the basket, and one unleavened wafer, and put them into the hands of the Nazirite who has just shaved the hair of his consecration.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The priest shall then wave them as a wave offering before the LORD. This is a holy portion for the priest, in addition to the breast of the wave offering and the thigh that was presented. After that, the Nazirite may drink wine.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the law of the Nazirite who vows his offering to the LORD for his separation, in addition to whatever else he can afford; he must fulfill whatever vow he makes, according to the law of his separation.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Tell Aaron and his sons: This is how you are to bless the Israelites. Say to them:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: ‘May the LORD bless you and keep you;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: may the LORD cause His face to shine upon you and be gracious to you;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: may the LORD lift up His countenance toward you and give you peace.’
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So they shall put My name on the Israelites, and I will bless them.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the day Moses finished setting up the tabernacle, he anointed and consecrated it and all its furnishings, along with the altar and all its utensils.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the leaders of Israel, the heads of their families, presented an offering. These men were the tribal leaders who had supervised the registration.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: They brought as their offering before the LORD six covered carts and twelve oxen—an ox from each leader and a cart from every two leaders—and presented them before the tabernacle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Accept these gifts from them, that they may be used in the work of the Tent of Meeting. And give them to the Levites, to each man according to his service.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses took the carts and oxen and gave them to the Levites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He gave the Gershonites two carts and four oxen, as their service required,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and he gave the Merarites four carts and eight oxen, as their service required, all under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But he did not give any to the Kohathites, since they were to carry on their shoulders the holy objects for which they were responsible.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When the altar was anointed, the leaders approached with their offerings for its dedication and presented them before the altar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible

translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Speak to Aaron and tell him: ‘When you set up the seven lamps, they are to light the area in front of the lampstand.’”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And Aaron did so; he set up the lamps facing toward the front of the lampstand, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is how the lampstand was constructed: it was made of hammered gold from its base to its blossoms, fashioned according to the pattern the LORD had shown Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Take the Levites from among the Israelites and make them ceremonially clean.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is what you must do to cleanse them: Sprinkle them with the water of purification. Have them shave their whole bodies and wash their clothes, and so purify themselves.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then have them take a young bull with its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and you are to take a second young bull for a sin offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Bring the Levites before the Tent of Meeting and assemble the whole congregation of Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are to present the Levites before the LORD and have the Israelites lay their hands upon them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Aaron is to present the Levites before the LORD as a wave offering from the sons of Israel, so that they may perform the service of the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the Levites are to lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, and offer to the LORD one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering, to make atonement for the Levites.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are to have the Levites stand before Aaron and his sons and then present them before the LORD as a wave offering.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In this way you shall separate the Levites from the rest of the Israelites, and the Levites will belong to Me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: After you have cleansed them and presented them as a wave offering, they may come to serve at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the Levites have been wholly given to Me from among the sons of Israel. I have taken them for Myself in place of all who come first from the womb, the firstborn of all the sons of Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For every firstborn male in Israel is Mine, both man and beast. I set them apart for Myself on the day I struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But I have taken the Levites in place of all the firstborn among the sons of Israel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And I have given the Levites as a gift to Aaron and his sons from among the Israelites, to perform the service for the Israelites at the Tent of Meeting and to make atonement on their behalf, so that no plague will come against the Israelites when they approach the sanctuary.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses, Aaron, and the whole congregation of Israel did with the Levites everything that the LORD had commanded Moses they should do.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The Levites purified themselves and washed their clothes, and Aaron presented them as a wave offering before the LORD. Aaron also made atonement for them to cleanse them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: After that, the Levites came to perform their service at the Tent of Meeting in the presence of Aaron and his sons. Thus they did with the Levites just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: And the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “This applies to the Levites: Men twenty-five years of age or older shall enter to perform the service in the work at the Tent of Meeting.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But at the age of fifty, they must retire from performing the work and no longer serve.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: After that, they may assist their brothers in fulfilling their duties at the Tent of Meeting, but they themselves are not to do the work. This is how you are to assign responsibilities to the Levites.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In the first month of the second year after Israel had come out of the land of Egypt, the LORD spoke to Moses in the Wilderness of Sinai:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “The Israelites are to observe the Passover at its appointed time.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You are to observe it at the appointed time, at twilight on the fourteenth day of this month, in accordance with its statutes and ordinances.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So Moses told the Israelites to observe the Passover,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and they did so in the Wilderness of Sinai, at twilight on the fourteenth day of the first month. The Israelites did everything just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But there were some men who were unclean due to a dead body, so they could not observe the Passover on that day. And they came before Moses and Aaron that same day
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and said to Moses, “We are unclean because of a dead body, but why should we be excluded from presenting the LORD’s offering with the other Israelites at the appointed time?”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Wait here until I find out what the LORD commands concerning you,” Moses replied.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Then the LORD said to Moses,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Tell the Israelites: ‘When any one of you or your descendants is unclean because of a dead body, or is away on a journey, he may still observe the Passover to the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Such people are to observe it at twilight on the fourteenth day of the second month. They are to eat the lamb, together with unleavened bread and bitter herbs;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: they may not leave any of it until morning or break any of its bones. They must observe the Passover according to all its statutes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: But if a man who is ceremonially clean and is not on a journey still fails to observe the Passover, he must be cut off from his people, because he did not present the LORD’s offering at its appointed time. That man will bear the consequences of his sin.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If a foreigner dwelling among you wants to observe the Passover to the LORD, he is to do so according to the Passover statute and its ordinances. You are to apply the same statute to both the foreigner and the native of the land.’”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: On the day that the tabernacle, the Tent of the Testimony, was set up, the cloud covered it and appeared like fire above the tabernacle from evening until morning.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It remained that way continually; the cloud would cover the tabernacle by day, and at night it would appear like fire.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whenever the cloud was lifted from above the Tent, the Israelites would set out, and wherever the cloud settled, there the Israelites would camp.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: At the LORD’s command the Israelites set out, and at the LORD’s command they camped. As long as the cloud remained over the tabernacle, they remained encamped.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even when the cloud lingered over the tabernacle for many days, the Israelites kept the LORD’s charge and did not set out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sometimes the cloud remained over the tabernacle for only a few days, and they would camp at the LORD’s command and set out at the LORD’s command.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
